title: Sanji Is Trapped by the Wedding
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Judge, Reiju, Brûlée, Chopper, Sanji, Carrot as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A feeling of unrest settles around the Chateau as the tea party event approaches

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No clue. I saw her leave a bit ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where will those two live after the marriage ceremony?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we don't take that girl as "hostage", who knows what they'll start to demand of us in the future?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember that we're dealing with pirates here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aren't you worried that they'll try a similar tactic on us though?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit being ridiculous, NJI! If they tell us that they'll kill Sanji, do you think we'll be affected in the slightest?

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: to be living with Sanji again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is going to make the perfect stew!()

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: brulee just dug her own grave!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That,thing up there is actually a frog that was made to look like carrot, thanks to "brulee's powers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is actually hiding in the attic!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Still... even though it's just a frog...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel kind of bad for it having to be cooked 'I' alive like that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There are 16 enemies in this house.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The most troublesome looking ones include...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Time to give that adorable face of yours 3rd degree burns!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And that mystery chimney looking dude named...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's going to struggle!! We must close this lid as soon as possible!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Some intruder is inside the attic!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is no time to pull jokes, Randolph!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There are two little bunny girls?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 61 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
